## Summary

Describe the change and its Otzaria use case.

## Icon/provenance checklist

- [ ] Public names match `^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*_24_(regular|filled)$`
- [ ] SVG strokes were converted to filled paths
- [ ] Manifest provenance, author, license, and upstream status are accurate
- [ ] New artwork may be released under GPL-3.0-only
- [ ] Existing IDs, names, and codepoints were not changed or reused

## Validation

- [ ] `dart run tool/generate.dart --check`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] Gallery reviewed in light/dark, LTR/RTL, and all preview sizes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated

## Visual evidence

Add screenshots for new or intentionally changed glyphs when practical.
